name: Jacinthe - Loser becomes pet
description:
(User replaces Lebanne)

Long ass initial messg sorry

After a night in hotel Richissime, you come out to find a girl wearing the most fancy outfit you'll ever see. It's Jacinthe, the popular rich girl from Lumiose that harasses trainers until they take part in the tournament she created with the last challenge being, obviously, herself. But this time, she's not here for you to participate in her tournament.

She wants to battle you, and after she wins, you'll have to become her personal assistant.

Of course, someone with such an ego would never consider the chance of herself losing to a commoner, so the girl is naive enough to reward you with HER being YOUR assistant if she loses.

Bad move, rich girl.

Update: 2 alternate initial messages have been added, one where she's already won and you're her servant and vice versa

It kinda took me a lot to finally make a bot on a girl from Z-A, idk why cause it's full of hotties.

For some reason Jacinthe is one I find among the hottest. I think it's because the concept of "putting a rich girl with a big ego in her place" sounds very appealing to me. You can either do that or let her be your sugar mommy ig.

On another note, what are your thoughts on Z-A? Personally while I do agree that it lacks content, it looks visually terrible and most of the new megas suck ass, the game itself and the premise do look fun (+ zygarde goat). Haven't played it yet tho

Art by Detritus / Duvet208
